metadata.name: UW-RestClients-SWS
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: A library for connecting to the SWS at the University of Washington

modules.name: uw_sws.course
documentation: Interfacing with the Student Web Service, for Section and Course resources.

functions.name: uw_sws.course._get_course_by_label
documentation:
Returns the response data for a search request containing the
passed course label.

functions.name: uw_sws.course._json_to_courseref
documentation: Returns a Course object created from the passed json data.

functions.name: uw_sws.dao.sws_now
documentation: Return a naive datetime corresponding to the natural SWS timezone.

methods.name: uw_sws.dao.SWS_DAO._make_notice_date
documentation: Set the date attribte value in the notice mock data

modules.name: uw_sws.test
documentation: This is just a test runner for coverage

modules.name: uw_sws.degree
documentation: Interfacing with the search for a student's degree status

functions.name: uw_sws.degree.get_degrees_by_regid
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.DegreeStatus objects
Raise DataFailureException if the SWS response any error

modules.name: uw_sws.college
documentation: Interfacing with the Student Web Service, College Search..

functions.name: uw_sws.college.get_all_colleges
documentation:
Returns a list of restclients.College models, representing all
colleges.

modules.name: uw_sws.registration
documentation: Interfacing with the Student Web Service, Registration_Search query.

functions.name: uw_sws.registration.get_active_registrations_by_section
documentation:
Returns a list of restclients.Registration objects, representing
active registrations for the passed section. For independent study
sections, section.independent_study_instructor_regid limits
registrations to that instructor.

functions.name: uw_sws.registration.get_all_registrations_by_section
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.Registration objects,
representing all (active and inactive) registrations for the passed
section. For independent study sections,
section.independent_study_instructor_regid limits registrations to
that instructor.

functions.name: uw_sws.registration._registrations_for_section_with_active_flag
documentation:
Returns a list of all uw_sws.models.Registration objects
for a section. There can be duplicates for a person.
If is_active is True, the objects will have is_active set to True.
Otherwise, is_active is undefined, and out of scope for this method.

functions.name: uw_sws.registration._json_to_registrations
documentation: Returns a list of all uw_sws.models.Registration objects

functions.name: uw_sws.registration.get_credits_by_section_and_regid
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Registration object
for the section and regid passed in.
This function won't work when the dup_code is not empty

functions.name: uw_sws.registration.get_credits_by_reg_url
documentation: Returns a decimal value of the course credits

functions.name: uw_sws.registration.get_schedule_by_regid_and_term
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.ClassSchedule object
for the regid and term passed in.
transcriptable_course values: "{|yes|no|all}".
kwargs:
  instructor_reg_id="{instructor regid}"
  (to search the registration with an independent study instructor).
Exceptions: DataFailureException, ThreadedDataError

functions.name: uw_sws.registration._add_registration_to_section
documentation: Add the Registration object to section.

methods.name: uw_sws.tests.test_section.SWSTestSectionData.test_linked_sections
documentation: Failing because linked section json files haven't been made

methods.name: uw_sws.tests.test_term.SWSTestTerm.test_previous_quarter_sws
documentation: Expected values will have to change when the json files are updated

methods.name: uw_sws.tests.test_term.SWSTestTerm.test_next_quarter_sws
documentation: Expected values will have to change when the json files are updated

modules.name: uw_sws.adviser
documentation: Interfacing with the search for a student's academic advisers

functions.name: uw_sws.adviser.get_advisers_by_regid
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.StudentAdviser objects
Raise DataFailureException if the SWS response any error

functions.name: uw_sws.util.abbr_week_month_day_str
documentation:
Return a string consists of abbreviated weekday, abbreviated month,
date with no leading zero, and without a year
e.g., Mon, Jun 2. No punctuation is shown for
the abbreviated weekday and month.

functions.name: uw_sws.util.convert_to_begin_of_day
documentation:
@return the naive datetime object of the beginning of day
for the give date or datetime object

functions.name: uw_sws.util.convert_to_end_of_day
documentation:
@return the naive datetime object of the end of day
for the give date or datetime object

functions.name: uw_sws.get_resource
documentation:
Issue a GET request to SWS with the given url
and return a response in json format.
:returns: http response with content in json

functions.name: uw_sws.put_resource
documentation:
Issue a GET request to SWS with the given url in order to obtain
an ETag header, followed by a PUT request to the same url. Returns
a response in json format.
:returns: http response with content in json

modules.name: uw_sws.notice
documentation:
Interfaceing with the Student Web Service,
 for notice resource

functions.name: uw_sws.notice.get_notices_by_regid
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.Notice objects
for the passed regid.

functions.name: uw_sws.notice._associate_short_long
documentation:
If a notice is type ${1}Short, associate with its Long notice
in an attribute called long_notice.

modules.name: uw_sws.person
documentation: Interfacing with the Student Web Service, Person resource

modules.name: uw_sws.term
documentation: This class interfaces with the Student Web Service, Term resource.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_term_by_year_and_quarter
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the passed year and quarter.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_current_term
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the current term.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_next_term
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term after the current term.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_previous_term
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term before the current term.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_next_term_sws
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term in next.json.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_previous_term_sws
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term in previous.json.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_term_before
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term before the term given.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_term_after
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Term object,
for the term after the term given.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_term_by_date
documentation: Returns a term for the datetime.date object given.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_specific_term
documentation: Rename the get_term_by_year_and_quarter to a short name.

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_next_autumn_term
documentation:
Return the Term object for the next autumn quarter
in the same year as the given term

functions.name: uw_sws.term.get_next_non_summer_term
documentation:
Return the Term object for the quarter after
as the given term (skip the summer quarter)

functions.name: uw_sws.section_status._json_to_sectionstatus
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.SectionStatus object
created from the passed json.

modules.name: uw_sws.compat
documentation:
Code for (old) restclients compatability.  None of this should be needed, but
it's here in the interest of not changing restclients tests during the move
to individual client libraries.

classes.name: uw_sws.compat.SWS
documentation:
The SWS object has methods for getting information
about courses, and everything related.

modules.name: uw_sws.enrollment
documentation: Interfacing with the Student Web Service, Enrollment resource.

functions.name: uw_sws.enrollment.get_grades_by_regid_and_term
documentation: Returns a StudentGrades model for the regid and term.

functions.name: uw_sws.enrollment._enrollment_search
documentation:
See SWS Enrollment search resource spec at:
<https://wiki.cac.washington.edu/x/_qjeAw>
\:return: search result json data

functions.name: uw_sws.enrollment.get_enrollment_history_by_regid
documentation:
---
return: a complete chronological list of all the enrollemnts
---

\[Enrollment\], where the Enrollment object has a term element.

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_sections_by_instructor_and_term
uw_sws.section.get_sections_by_delegate_and_term

Returns a list of uw_sws.models.SectionReference objects
for the passed curriculum and term.

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_sections_by_building_and_term
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.SectionReference objects
for the passed building and term.

functions.name: uw_sws.section._json_to_sectionref
documentation:
Returns a list of SectionReference object created from
the passed json data.

functions.name: uw_sws.section._get_sections_by_person_and_term
uw_sws.section.get_section_by_url
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Section object
for the passed section url.

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_section_by_label
documentation:
Returns a uw_sws.models.Section object for
the passed section label.

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_linked_sections
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.Section objects,
representing linked sections for the passed section.

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_joint_sections
documentation:
Returns a list of uw_sws.models.Section objects,

functions.name: uw_sws.section.get_prefetch_for_section_data
documentation:
This will return a list of methods that can be called to prefetch (in
threads) content that would be fetched while building the section.

This depends on a good cache backend.  Without that, this will just double
the work that's needed :(

Each method is identified by a key, so they can be deduped if multiple
sections want the same data, such as a common instructor.

functions.name: uw_sws.section._json_to_section
documentation: Returns a section model created from the passed json.

methods.name: uw_sws.models.Notice.json_data
documentation: long_notice: if it is a short notice, this attribute
will point to the corresponding long notice
